channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says the U.S. is back to blockading Iran and will charge ships a toll in Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran are competing for control of the Strait of Hormuz, risking a return to full conflict after a ceasefire last month.

item.title: A guard punched him on camera. It was still nearly impossible for him to sue
item.description: Prisoners can file complaints about mistreatment, but doing so often leads to retaliation, according to an NPR investigation.

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire prospects fade as tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines.

item.title: States sue to block Paramount-Warner Bros blockbuster merger
item.description: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite major studios.
